title: RUTHLESS
description: From mining zombies, to running creepers, ruthless is a mod that makes the game a lot harder by giving mobs more unique attacks and generally making them stronger.
body:
**Ruthless has plans to add more content than simply changing mob behaviour.
Ruthless overhauls vanilla hostile enemies by giving them new attacks, overhauling their entire statistics and making them just generally way stronger than in vanilla. Some mobs will have brand new things such as effects, items, blocks, and retextures. However this is not the case as of now as it only changes a few of the mobs in the game.**

Mobs will sometimes rely on eachother and work together.
Ruthless does not change animals, golems, or bosses. But it WILL modify every "monster" enemy. 
![Rampage!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90828f2fb66065985bc6b5a8a6452bf5940393a2.png)

All mobs currently changed:

Zombies

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Zombies now run faster
- Zombies see way, way further than they have before.
- Zombies now spawn with tools way more commonly
- Zombies can use totems
- Zombies can spawn with pickaxes and mine through blocks

</details>



Skeletons


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Skeletons now run way faster
- Skeletons see slightly further
- Skeletons now have a chance to spawn with swords
- Skeletons now spawn with naturally enchanted bows

</details>



Creepers


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Creepers now sprint around
- Creepers can release gas which gives you the Dazed effect

</details>



Spiders


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Spiders now scutter extremely fast
- Spiders now automatically make mobs ride them
- Spiders strafe more commonly

</details>



Endermen


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Endermen sometimes teleport you a couple blocks up on attack

</details>



Phantoms


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Phantoms kidnap players and take them into the sky

</details>



Witches

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Witches will chase players 

</details>



Most changes can be changed in configs so consider getting a config mod where you can turn them off in-game!

MOD IS IN ALPHA, EXPECT IT TO BE BUGGY
